title: Equipment
description: Weapons, armor, shields, tools, consumables, magic items, ammunition, and miscellaneous gear. Each entry is a self-contained spec usable by fixtures (`weapons:` block on pc_spec inlines the same shape today; PR #84 formalizes the schema for content-loader-managed equipment files). Category-specific fields apply based on `category`. Magic-item entries can carry `attunement`, `charges`, and `effect_primitives` for ongoing magical effects.

rarity.description: RAW PHB 2024 magic-item rarity tier. Non-magic items can omit (treated as 'mundane').

cost_gp.description: Cost in gold pieces. Use 0 for items with no listed cost (priceless magic items, quest rewards).

attunement.description: Magic items: does the item require attunement to use? RAW: a creature can attune to at most 3 items.

restrictions.description: Free-text RAW restrictions (e.g., 'by a creature of good alignment', 'by a spellcaster').

charges.description: For magic items with daily/recharge charges. Wand-shape items use this; consumables use single-use convention via `consumable: true` on the misc shape instead.

recharge.description: RAW recharge text. Common patterns: 'dawn:1dN+M' (Wand of Magic Missiles-shape), 'long_rest_full' (full restore), 'short_rest:N' (recover N charges per short rest).

weapon.description: Present when category = weapon. Mirrors the inline weapon spec used by pc_spec.weapons today (PR #54+ pipeline: damage_dice, attack_ability, properties).

attack_ability.description: Default ability for attack rolls (str / dex). Finesse weapons can elect dex regardless; ranged weapons typically dex.

range_ft.description: Ranged weapons only. Number = normal range; if a separate `long_range_ft` exists the weapon has disadvantage past normal.

properties.description: RAW weapon properties (Light, Heavy, Finesse, Two-Handed, Versatile, Loading, Reach, Thrown, Ammunition, Special). Each is a flag the engine reads at runtime.

versatile.description: Versatile dice when wielded two-handed, e.g., '1d10'

special.description: RAW special-text properties (lance, lance, net, etc.)

mastery.description: PHB 2024 Weapon Mastery property. Engine reads at runtime via engine.core.weapon_masteries.

armor.description: Present when category = armor. RAW: base AC formula varies by armor type (light/medium/heavy + shield). PR #84 formalizes; pc_schema's _compute_ac already uses this shape inline.

max_dex_bonus.description: Light: no cap (null); Medium: +2; Heavy: +0. null = no cap.

strength_requirement.description: RAW: wearing heavy armor below the STR requirement halves your speed.

don_time.description: RAW don/doff time (1 minute, 5 minutes, etc.)

shield.description: Present when category = shield. RAW: +2 AC, requires a free hand.

tool.description: Present when category = tool. Tool proficiencies grant PB on related ability checks.

consumable.description: Present when category = consumable (or for any single-use item). Potions, scrolls, ammunition stacks, basic poisons, etc.

effect_primitives.description: For magic items + tool benefits. Engine effects this item grants when worn / wielded / attuned. Bonus to attack rolls, AC, saves, skill checks, etc. — uses the same primitive vocabulary as features/spells/conditions.

granted_actions.description: For magic items that add an action to the wielder's action list (Wand of Magic Missiles, Cloak of Displacement, etc.). pc_schema's generic feature-action auto-attach pass (PR #82) does NOT process equipment today — fixtures explicitly attach equipment actions. A future PR could extend the auto-attach to equipment.
